afternoon.

And so I think I'm excited about the direction that they're take for some of these types of products and services that really have a lot of potential to to help add value across the The platform.

together.

um, but we have a situation like I said that we have someone that is We are going to continue managing for, but they're wanting to to move to a different tool, um, on their own, similar to the way Livecore does, but on a significantly smaller scale for it too.

So we need to build in some flexibility, um, going.
You know, or, or clarity to the flexibility going forward, which I think maybe was missing in the current, uh, in the current documents.

I think that's, I think that's fair, right?

OK.

that from our vendor partners in a similar way.

quite a bit above the original kind of contracted amount.

new client we will have what we call a platform call where we run through kind of exactly what I just said.

versus, um, you know, maybe we, maybe we handle that renewal in such a way that it gets us on to a regular cycle.
